label: Agent Supervisor
description: Run a supervisor + worker pool through openagentic-proxy with orchestration='supervisor'. The supervisor delegates subtasks to workers.

settings.name: supervisorPrompt
settings.label: Supervisor goal / prompt
settings.description: The high-level goal the supervisor should accomplish.

settings.name: agents
settings.label: Worker agents
settings.description: Array of worker agent specs the supervisor can delegate to.

ai.shortDescription: Supervisor agent + worker pool via openagentic-proxy.
ai.whenToUse: When one agent should plan and delegate to several worker agents (e.g. researcher coordinating analyst + summarizer).
ai.examplePrompt: supervisor coordinates a researcher and a fact-checker on the trigger payload
ai.promptHints: Reference the merged supervisor output with {{steps.<id>.content}}.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_majority_succeeded
outputAssertions.expression: result && Array.isArray(result.agents) && result.agents.filter(a => a && (a.status === 'completed' || a.status === 'success')).length >= Math.ceil(result.agents.length / 2)
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Less than half of the supervisor's agents completed successfully.

outputAssertions.name: multi_agent_substantive_output
outputAssertions.expression: !result || !result.content || (result.content.length > 0 && !result.content.match(/^\s*(I (could not|couldn't|cannot|can't|do not have|don't have|am unable|wasn't able|was not able)|Sorry,? (I|but)|I'?m sorry,?|I apologize,?|Unfortunately,? (I|no)|No (information|data|results|content) (available|found))/i))
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Supervisor produced no substantive output (likely all workers refused / returned 'no info').
